notes: Plan aligns with CLAUDE.md module split (src/seed/sessionSeed.ts) and recommended architecture.
Dependencies US-003 (signals), US-004 (signals refactor), US-005 (geo) are implemented: BrowserSignals and GeoHint types are exported and stable.
main.ts integration point is clean — geo is already fetched, signals import is straightforward to add.
Hash approach (djb2/FNV-1a on JSON.stringify with sorted keys) is appropriate for a non-cryptographic scene seed.
Singleton pattern (initSessionSeed/getSessionSeed) correctly ensures session stability without persisting source data.
Test plan covers all four acceptance criteria and follows existing vitest/jsdom conventions (vi.spyOn, vi.resetModules, storage API spy assertions).
No architectural conflicts: no new dependencies, no storage APIs, no breaking changes to existing modules.
Pointer entropy correctly excluded from session seed per plan notes — it is a per-frame signal, not session-level.
